title: Playground
description:
A hands-on reference plugin that packs every first-party Brika SDK feature into one place. **Playground** is the kitchen-sink example: a working transform block, a full preferences panel, and a real file browser you can poke at.

- **Echo** — passes any input straight through to the output, with an optional prefix and suffix on string payloads, and fires an `echoed` spark on every tick
- **File Browser** — upload, preview, download, sort, create folders, and delete files inside the plugin's sandboxed `/data` directory, all routed through the grant runtime with a consent gate when filesystem access is denied
- **Preferences showcase** — every preference type the system supports: password (kept in the OS keychain), text, number, checkbox, and dropdown, with init and change hooks wired up

Every filesystem operation is scoped to `/data` and approved by the operator, making it the ideal starting point for building your own Brika plugin.
